# AI Ops Engineer — Fakeco (Toronto)

We're hiring AI Ops Engineers to make our agent systems reliable in production.

## What you'll do
- Own evals and observability for our customer-facing agent platform.
- Run on-call rotations for agent incidents and write the postmortems.
- Partner with product engineers to ship safer prompt changes.

## What we need
- Strong Python.
- Experience with LLM eval harnesses (rubric or comparison based).
- Comfort with OpenTelemetry or equivalent tracing tools.

## Nice to have
- Background in SRE or DevOps before transitioning into AI Ops.
- Open-source contributions to agent tooling.

## How to apply
Apply using AI throughout the application. Tell us how you did it in the cover letter.
